diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Exports Hono class, types (Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, etc.), Context, HonoRequest, and client types (InferRequest, InferResponse)
+- Internal names noticed: Hono (re-exported), Context, types re-exports
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point re-exporting all public APIs and types for Hono framework
+- Copy-safe detail: Re-exports core class and all type exports in one file for simple onboarding
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Bindings/Variables, Env, Input type families, RouterRoute, Handler/MiddlewareHandler types, HandlerInterface methods, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, OnHandlerInterface
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase (imported as type), H, IntersectNonAnyTypes, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath, MergeTypedResponse, MergeMiddlewareResponse, ToSchema, IfAnyThenEmptyObject, IsAny, JSONValue, Simplify
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Comprehensive type definitions for Hono handlers, middleware, routes, and environment handling
+- Copy-safe detail: Type-only module defining the entire type system Hono relies upon
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class with constructor, routes, options (router, getPath)
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase (extends), SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./types, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router
+- Plain-English summary: Main Hono class extending HonoBase with default router and configuration
+- Copy-safe detail: Thin wrapper around HonoBase, provides the primary public-facing class
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: get/post/put/delete/patch/on/use methods for route registration, basePath, onError, notFound, route, mount, fetch, request, fire
+- Internal names noticed: compose, Context, Router, H, Env, Schema, next handler, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, #addRoute, #dispatch, mergePath, getPath
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Core Hono app scaffolding providing request handling via method-based routing and middleware composition
+- Copy-safe detail: Complete application framework with routing, middleware, error handling, and request dispatch logic
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class with env, event, executionCtx, res, header, status, set, get, var, body, text, json, html, redirect, notFound, render methods
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, Result, Env, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, Renderer, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, HTMLRespond, DefaultRenderer, HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, #var, #status, #executionCtx, #res, #matchResult, #preparedHeaders, resolveCallback
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./types, ./utils/headers, ./utils/html, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Context class providing request/response lifecycle, variables, headers, status codes, and all response methods
+- Copy-safe detail: Main Context class implementing full response generation and context variable management
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class with raw, path, query, queries, header, param, queries, parseBody, json, text, arrayBuffer, bytes, blob, formData, valid, addValidatedData, url, method, matchedRoutes, routePath
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, GET_MATCH_RESULT, parseBody, BodyData, RequestHeader, CustomHeader, HonoRequest, ParamKeys, ValidationTargets, decodeURIComponent_, getQueryParam, getQueryParams, tryDecode, cloneRawRequest, BodyCache
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Request object mirroring native Request with decoding, routing match results, and body parsing utilities
+- Copy-safe detail: Request handling class with full body caching and parameter/query/header access
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT (unique symbol export)
+- Internal names noticed: None
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Exports unique symbol for request match result identification
+- Copy-safe detail: Single symbol constant for internal routing identification
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody function
+- Internal names noticed: BodyData, BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, ParseBodyOptions, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request
+- Plain-English summary: Body parsing utility supporting multipart/form-data and urlencoded data with dot notation support
+- Copy-safe detail: Standalone body parsing with nested object and multiple value handling
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function
+- Internal names noticed: Context, Env, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler, index, dispatch, isError, handler, res
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware execution engine composing handlers in a stack and calling next() for downstream handlers
+- Copy-safe detail: Koa-style middleware composifier managing handler chain execution and error/notFound fallbacks
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class extending Error
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions, ContentfulStatusCode, getResponse, constructor
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: Custom HTTP error for throwing during authentication failures, supports custom message and pre-made responses
+- Copy-safe detail: Error class that can return existing response or generate new one with custom message
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError, exported types (InferResponseType, InferRequestType, ClientRequestOptions)
+- Internal names noticed: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./client/utils, ./client/types
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client providing functional request builder and typed response parsing
+- Copy-safe detail: Client API exposing hc helper and response parsing utilities
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc, ClientRequestImpl class with fetch method
+- Internal names noticed: createProxy, ClientRequestImpl, Client, ClientRequestOptions, Callback, buildSearchParams, deepMerge, mergePath, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, parseResponse, buildSearchParamsOption, lastParts, proxyCallback
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ./utils/cookie, ./utils/types, ./types, ./utils/index
+- Plain-English summary: Client-side HTTP request builder with method chaining, path parameters, query serialization, and protocol switching, creates proxy for fluent API
+- Copy-safe detail: Request builder with URL manipulation, parameter substitution, WebSocket support, and fetch integration
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, Fetch, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, InferRequestOptionsType, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode
+- Internal names noticed: METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE, METHODS, Endpoint, ExtractSchema, KnownResponseFormat, ResponseFormat, BuildSearchParamsFn, Callback, ObjectType, GlobalResponseDefinition, ToEndpoints, ModRoute, ModSchema, PickRoute, PickSchema, IsEmptyObject, IsLiteral, TrimStartSlash, TrimEndSlash, BuildPath, BuildPathname, BuildSearch, BuildTypedURL, HonoURL, TypedURL, ApplyParam, ParseHostName
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../router, ../types, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: TypeScript type system for client-side requests, provides inference of request/response types and protocol switching types
+- Copy-safe detail: Extensive type definitions enabling type-safe API client creation and automatic request construction
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, parseResponse
+- Internal names noticed: DetailedError, mergePath, buildSearchParams, deepMerge, removeIndexString, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, isObject
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Request building utilities for URL manipulation, query string serialization, and smart response parsing
+- Copy-safe detail: Small utility functions for URL construction and response data extraction
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: fetchRP, DetailedError, detectResponseType, nullBodyResponses, jsonRegex
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Response parsing function that detects content-type and parses JSON/text, throws DetailedError on non-ok responses
+- Copy-safe detail: Minimal fetch result handler detecting response type and parsing payload
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire function
+- Internal names noticed: fire, handle, Hono, HandleOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../../types, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter registering Hono app via addEventListener with handle option
+- Copy-safe detail: Adapter to run Hono inside Service Worker context by wiring addEventListener
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle function, HandleOptions
+- Internal names noticed: Handler, FetchEvent, globalThis.fetch, app.fetch, opts, evt, respondWith
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Fetch event handler for service worker that delegates to Hono app with optional fallback
+- Copy-safe detail: Simple handler adapting Hono fetch to Service Worker request/response pattern
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent interface, ExtendableEvent type definitions
+- Internal names noticed: clientId, handled, preloadResponse, request, resultingClientId, ExtendableEvent
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker FetchEvent type definitions extending the standard ExtendableEvent
+- Copy-safe detail: Minimal type-only definitions for SW event types
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
\ No newline at end of file

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
